name: Feature request

title: ""

<!--
This is for the reference implementation, test suite, tooling, or documentation.

A change to the PROTOCOL — the wire format, semantics, or conformance requirements —
goes through the HEP process instead (spec §18, CONTRIBUTING.md). If your request would
change harp.cddl or add/alter a capability string, it's a HEP: say so below and open the
discussion rather than this template.
-->

## The problem

What's missing or awkward today, and who hits it (a device implementer? a host? a
tester?).

## Proposed change

What you'd like, concretely. Keep it inside the current protocol unless you're
explicitly proposing a HEP.

## Does this touch the wire?

- [ ] No — implementation / tests / tooling / docs only.
- [ ] Yes — this needs a **HEP** (§18): a normative diff, capability strings, test
      additions, and two interoperating implementations before it merges. I understand
      this issue is the pre-HEP discussion, not the change itself.

## Alternatives / prior art

Anything you considered, and how existing HARP mechanisms fall short.
